# BP-120 positive variant: an aliased Fiber context still discards BodyParser's error.
lang: go
file: BP-120-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: fiber
---
package sample

import fiber "github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"

func update(ctx *fiber.Ctx) error {
	var request struct {
		Enabled bool `json:"enabled"`
	}
	ctx.BodyParser(&request)
	return nil
}
